nofo_title: FY2025 State Homeland Security Program (SHSP) NOFO
project_narrative: Cook County OEEM proposes a comprehensive multi-agency training and exercise program designed to enhance regional coordination capabilities for catastrophic incident response across the Chicago metropolitan area.

risk_assessment: Key risks include supply chain delays for specialized P25 equipment and potential tower site permitting issues. Mitigation includes pre-qualification of multiple vendors and early engagement with county permitting offices.
work_plan:
Phase 1 (Months 1-3): Procurement and vendor selection
Phase 2 (Months 4-8): Equipment installation and tower upgrades
Phase 3 (Months 9-12): Testing, training, and full deployment
nofo_title: FY2025 State Homeland Security Program (SHSP) NOFO
project_narrative: The City of Springfield proposes to upgrade its public safety radio communications infrastructure to P25 Phase II standards.
